Aries.reading: Today is a great day to start something new.

Taurus.reading: Slow down and focus on comfort.

Capricorn.reading: Stay focused on long term goals.

Aries-Taurus.love_text: Passion meets stubbornness — exciting but challenging.
Aries-Taurus.friendship_text: Different paces can cause friction over time.
Aries-Taurus.communication_text: Aries moves fast; Taurus needs time to process.

Aries-Gemini.love_text: A lively, adventurous romance full of energy.
Aries-Gemini.friendship_text: These two keep each other endlessly entertained.
Aries-Gemini.communication_text: Fast-paced and stimulating — conversation flows naturally.

Aries-Cancer.love_text: Fire and water can steam — but also extinguish.
Aries-Cancer.friendship_text: Loyalty binds them, but emotional styles clash.
Aries-Cancer.communication_text: Aries bluntness can wound Cancer's sensitivity.

Aries-Leo.love_text: Two fire signs ignite a passionate, dramatic romance.
Aries-Leo.friendship_text: Bold, loyal, and endlessly fun together.
Aries-Leo.communication_text: Enthusiastic and direct — they just need to share the spotlight.

Aries-Virgo.love_text: Impulsive Aries clashes with Virgo's careful nature.
Aries-Virgo.friendship_text: Mutual respect can build, but patience is required.
Aries-Virgo.communication_text: Aries skips details Virgo considers essential.

Aries-Libra.love_text: Opposites attract — bold Aries balances graceful Libra.
Aries-Libra.friendship_text: They challenge each other to grow in healthy ways.
Aries-Libra.communication_text: Aries is direct; Libra is diplomatic — a useful contrast.

Aries-Scorpio.love_text: Intense chemistry with equally intense power struggles.
Aries-Scorpio.friendship_text: Deep loyalty once trust is earned, but trust takes time.
Aries-Scorpio.communication_text: Both are strong-willed — conversations can become battles.

Aries-Sagittarius.love_text: Two adventurers who fuel each other's fire.
Aries-Sagittarius.friendship_text: Spontaneous, fun, and always up for anything.
Aries-Sagittarius.communication_text: Honest and enthusiastic — they just get each other.

Aries-Capricorn.love_text: Ambition is shared, but approaches to life differ widely.
Aries-Capricorn.friendship_text: Respect is possible when each values the other's drive.
Aries-Capricorn.communication_text: Aries wants to leap; Capricorn insists on planning first.

Aries-Aquarius.love_text: Bold and unconventional — a refreshing, exciting pairing.
Aries-Aquarius.friendship_text: They inspire each other's independence and big ideas.
Aries-Aquarius.communication_text: Lively debates and genuine intellectual spark.

Aries-Pisces.love_text: Aries protects; Pisces softens — sweet but uneven.
Aries-Pisces.friendship_text: Compassion meets courage in an unlikely friendship.
Aries-Pisces.communication_text: Aries must slow down; Pisces must speak up.

Taurus-Gemini.love_text: Gemini's restlessness unsettles Taurus's need for stability.
Taurus-Gemini.friendship_text: Fun in short bursts, but hard to sustain long-term.
Taurus-Gemini.communication_text: Gemini talks to think; Taurus thinks before talking.

Taurus-Cancer.love_text: Nurturing and devoted — a deeply comforting bond.
Taurus-Cancer.friendship_text: Loyal, cozy, and built to last.
Taurus-Cancer.communication_text: Both value emotional honesty and genuine connection.

Taurus-Leo.love_text: Both love luxury, but both also love being in charge.
Taurus-Leo.friendship_text: Warm and generous with each other when egos align.
Taurus-Leo.communication_text: Stubbornness on both sides requires patience.

Taurus-Virgo.love_text: Earth signs in perfect harmony — practical and devoted.
Taurus-Virgo.friendship_text: Reliable, grounded, and deeply trustworthy together.
Taurus-Virgo.communication_text: Clear, thoughtful, and on the same wavelength.

Taurus-Libra.love_text: Both ruled by Venus — beauty and romance come naturally.
Taurus-Libra.friendship_text: Shared appreciation for art, comfort, and good taste.
Taurus-Libra.communication_text: Harmonious, though both can avoid difficult truths.

Taurus-Scorpio.friendship_text: Unshakeable loyalty once the bond is forged.
Taurus-Scorpio.communication_text: Deep but slow — both prefer substance over small talk.

Taurus-Sagittarius.love_text: Taurus craves roots; Sagittarius craves the open road.
Taurus-Sagittarius.friendship_text: Occasional adventures together, but different home bases.
Taurus-Sagittarius.communication_text: Sagittarius's bluntness can catch Taurus off guard.

Taurus-Capricorn.love_text: A power couple — stable, ambitious, and deeply loyal.
Taurus-Capricorn.friendship_text: Built on mutual respect and long-term thinking.
Taurus-Capricorn.communication_text: Practical and direct — no drama, just results.

Taurus-Aquarius.love_text: Tradition vs. rebellion — a fundamental tension.
Taurus-Aquarius.friendship_text: Interesting differences, but hard to find common ground.
Taurus-Aquarius.communication_text: Taurus wants certainty; Aquarius questions everything.

Taurus-Pisces.friendship_text: Taurus grounds Pisces; Pisces inspires Taurus.
Taurus-Pisces.communication_text: Patient and empathetic — they listen to each other well.

Gemini-Cancer.love_text: Curious Gemini and emotional Cancer need effort to connect.
Gemini-Cancer.friendship_text: Warmth is there, but needs tending.
Gemini-Cancer.communication_text: Gemini lives in the mind; Cancer lives in the heart.

Gemini-Leo.friendship_text: Social, fun, and genuinely great companions.
Gemini-Leo.communication_text: Both love to talk, perform, and be heard.

Gemini-Virgo.love_text: Both ruled by Mercury, but very different styles.
Gemini-Virgo.friendship_text: Intellectual bond is strong; emotional bond takes work.
Gemini-Virgo.communication_text: Sharp and analytical — debates are lively and frequent.

Gemini-Libra.love_text: Air signs in perfect flow — charming, social, and in love.
Gemini-Libra.friendship_text: Effortless friendship built on wit and shared ideas.
Gemini-Libra.communication_text: One of the best communicator pairings in the zodiac.

Gemini-Scorpio.love_text: Gemini's lightness clashes with Scorpio's intensity.
Gemini-Scorpio.communication_text: Scorpio wants depth; Gemini wants variety.

Gemini-Sagittarius.love_text: Opposite signs with electric, restless chemistry.
Gemini-Sagittarius.friendship_text: Adventure partners who never run out of things to explore.
Gemini-Sagittarius.communication_text: Enthusiastic and expansive — big ideas on both sides.

Gemini-Capricorn.love_text: Capricorn's seriousness and Gemini's playfulness rarely click.
Gemini-Capricorn.friendship_text: Respect is possible but closeness is rare.
Gemini-Capricorn.communication_text: Different priorities make sustained dialogue difficult.

Gemini-Aquarius.love_text: Two air signs who genuinely delight in each other's minds.
Gemini-Aquarius.communication_text: Ideas spark ideas — conversation never gets old.

Gemini-Pisces.love_text: Dreamy Pisces and curious Gemini drift in different directions.
Gemini-Pisces.friendship_text: Creative and imaginative together, but hard to pin down.
Gemini-Pisces.communication_text: Gemini thinks out loud; Pisces feels first, words come later.

Cancer-Leo.love_text: Leo dazzles; Cancer nurtures — warmth on both sides.
Cancer-Leo.friendship_text: Loyal and caring, with Leo adding sparkle.
Cancer-Leo.communication_text: Cancer listens deeply; Leo speaks boldly.

Cancer-Virgo.love_text: Caring and attentive — both show love through acts of service.
Cancer-Virgo.communication_text: Thoughtful and considerate — they check in on each other.

Cancer-Libra.love_text: Both romantic, but emotional needs differ.
Cancer-Libra.friendship_text: Pleasant together, though depth takes time to build.
Cancer-Libra.communication_text: Cancer wants emotional validation; Libra seeks balance.

Cancer-Scorpio.love_text: Two water signs — profound, intuitive, and transformative.
Cancer-Scorpio.friendship_text: Fierce loyalty and deep emotional understanding.
Cancer-Scorpio.communication_text: Unspoken understanding runs deeper than words.

Cancer-Sagittarius.love_text: Cancer needs a nest; Sagittarius needs the horizon.
Cancer-Sagittarius.friendship_text: Adventures together, but home bases are very different.
Cancer-Sagittarius.communication_text: Sagittarius's candor can feel harsh to Cancer.

Cancer-Capricorn.love_text: Opposite signs who balance each other beautifully.
Cancer-Capricorn.friendship_text: Capricorn provides structure; Cancer provides warmth.
Cancer-Capricorn.communication_text: Practical meets emotional — both must meet in the middle.

Cancer-Aquarius.love_text: Cancer's intimacy needs clash with Aquarius's detachment.
Cancer-Aquarius.communication_text: Cancer speaks from the heart; Aquarius from the head.

Cancer-Pisces.love_text: Deeply empathetic water signs — a soulful, tender love.
Cancer-Pisces.friendship_text: Intuitive and compassionate — they feel what the other needs.
Cancer-Pisces.communication_text: Emotional fluency makes every conversation feel safe.

Leo-Virgo.love_text: Leo shines; Virgo refines — admiration mixed with critique.
Leo-Virgo.friendship_text: Virgo supports Leo's goals; Leo lifts Virgo's confidence.
Leo-Virgo.communication_text: Leo expresses boldly; Virgo edits carefully.

Leo-Libra.friendship_text: Social butterflies who elevate each other.
Leo-Libra.communication_text: Warm and expressive — they make each other feel seen.

Leo-Scorpio.love_text: Two powerful signs — magnetic but prone to power struggles.
Leo-Scorpio.friendship_text: Intense loyalty once trust is established.
Leo-Scorpio.communication_text: Both are proud and fixed — compromise is hard.

Leo-Sagittarius.love_text: Fire and fire — joyful, passionate, and free-spirited.
Leo-Sagittarius.friendship_text: Exuberant, generous, and endlessly fun together.
Leo-Sagittarius.communication_text: Optimistic and expressive — they cheer each other on.

Leo-Capricorn.love_text: Leo wants applause; Capricorn wants results — worlds apart.
Leo-Capricorn.friendship_text: Mutual ambition is a bridge, but styles differ.
Leo-Capricorn.communication_text: Leo leads with flair; Capricorn leads with strategy.

Leo-Aquarius.love_text: Opposite signs with electric tension and mutual fascination.
Leo-Aquarius.friendship_text: They challenge and inspire each other's worldview.

Leo-Pisces.love_text: Leo leads; Pisces adores — sweet but uneven.
Leo-Pisces.friendship_text: Creative and warm, with genuine affection.
Leo-Pisces.communication_text: Leo speaks; Pisces listens and reflects.

Virgo-Libra.love_text: Both thoughtful, but Virgo critiques while Libra harmonizes.
Virgo-Libra.friendship_text: Polite and considerate — a pleasant but gentle bond.

Virgo-Scorpio.love_text: Both perceptive and private — deeply compatible.
Virgo-Scorpio.friendship_text: Loyal and discerning — they value quality over quantity.
Virgo-Scorpio.communication_text: Precise and probing — they get to the truth together.

Virgo-Sagittarius.love_text: Virgo plans; Sagittarius improvises — a constant negotiation.
Virgo-Sagittarius.friendship_text: Occasional friction, but both value growth and learning.
Virgo-Sagittarius.communication_text: Virgo focuses on details Sagittarius glosses over.

Virgo-Capricorn.love_text: Earth sign excellence — dependable, devoted, and deep.
Virgo-Capricorn.friendship_text: Built on shared values of hard work and integrity.
Virgo-Capricorn.communication_text: Clear, purposeful, and always on the same page.

Virgo-Aquarius.love_text: Virgo seeks order; Aquarius seeks disruption.
Virgo-Aquarius.friendship_text: Intellectually interesting, but hard to get close.
Virgo-Aquarius.communication_text: Both analytical — interesting debates, if not always warm.

Virgo-Pisces.love_text: Opposite signs who heal and complete each other.
Virgo-Pisces.friendship_text: Virgo grounds Pisces's dreams in reality.
Virgo-Pisces.communication_text: Virgo is precise; Pisces is poetic — they find a middle ground.

Libra-Scorpio.love_text: Libra's lightness meets Scorpio's depth — intriguing tension.

Libra-Sagittarius.love_text: Charming and adventurous — a socially brilliant pairing.
Libra-Sagittarius.friendship_text: Optimistic, outgoing, and genuinely joyful together.
Libra-Sagittarius.communication_text: Philosophical and fun — ideas flow freely.

Libra-Capricorn.love_text: Both ambitious, but Libra socializes while Capricorn grinds.
Libra-Capricorn.friendship_text: Mutual respect, but different definitions of a good time.
Libra-Capricorn.communication_text: Libra seeks consensus; Capricorn seeks conclusions.

Libra-Aquarius.love_text: Air sign harmony — progressive, idealistic, and romantic.
Libra-Aquarius.friendship_text: A friendship built on shared ideals and genuine equality.
Libra-Aquarius.communication_text: Brilliant and balanced — one of the best pairings for dialogue.

Libra-Pisces.love_text: Romantic and gentle — both believe in love deeply.
Libra-Pisces.friendship_text: Compassionate and kind toward each other.
Libra-Pisces.communication_text: Both avoid conflict, which can leave things unresolved.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.love_text: Scorpio's intensity contrasts with Sagittarius's freedom.
Scorpio-Sagittarius.communication_text: Scorpio probes; Sagittarius deflects with humor.

Scorpio-Capricorn.love_text: Power couple energy — driven, private, and deeply bonded.
Scorpio-Capricorn.communication_text: Both prefer substance — no fluff, just real talk.

Scorpio-Aquarius.love_text: Fixed signs in a battle of wills — fascinating but exhausting.
Scorpio-Aquarius.friendship_text: Intrigued by each other, but rarely fully open.
Scorpio-Aquarius.communication_text: Scorpio wants intimacy; Aquarius wants independence.

Scorpio-Pisces.love_text: Two water signs in a soul-deep, transformative bond.
Scorpio-Pisces.friendship_text: Intuitive and fiercely loyal — a rare and powerful friendship.
Scorpio-Pisces.communication_text: They sense what the other means before it's said.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.love_text: Sagittarius roams free; Capricorn builds steadily — a tough match.
Sagittarius-Capricorn.friendship_text: Admiration from a distance is easier than closeness.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.love_text: Free-spirited and forward-thinking — a liberating love.
Sagittarius-Aquarius.communication_text: Visionary conversations that go on for hours.

Sagittarius-Pisces.love_text: Both dreamers, but one chases horizons and one drifts inward.
Sagittarius-Pisces.friendship_text: Spiritual and creative together, if a little ungrounded.
Sagittarius-Pisces.communication_text: Big-picture thinkers who sometimes miss the details.

Capricorn-Aquarius.love_text: Tradition meets revolution — a fundamental worldview clash.
Capricorn-Aquarius.friendship_text: Respect for each other's discipline, but little warmth.
Capricorn-Aquarius.communication_text: Capricorn is conventional; Aquarius rewrites the rules.

Capricorn-Pisces.love_text: Capricorn anchors Pisces's dreams into reality.
Capricorn-Pisces.friendship_text: Quietly devoted and complementary in all the right ways.
Capricorn-Pisces.communication_text: Capricorn offers clarity; Pisces offers perspective.

Aquarius-Pisces.love_text: Both idealistic, but one leads with logic and one with feeling.
Aquarius-Pisces.friendship_text: Compassionate and creative — a gentle, unusual bond.
Aquarius-Pisces.communication_text: Aquarius thinks big; Pisces feels big — interesting middle ground.

default.love_text: These signs have a decent romantic connection.
